/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX26.1.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/piranha_reference_compiler.dir/demos/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/piranha_reference_compiler.dir/demos/reference_language_rules.cpp.o CMakeFiles/piranha_reference_compiler.dir/demos/utilities.cpp.o -o piranha_reference_compiler  ../../../lib/libpiranha.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_filesystem.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_atomic.a
